name: Booking Section
description: An appointment or reservation booking section with date picker, time slot selection, service selection, and contact form. Supports business-specific booking flows.
whenToUse: Use for businesses that take appointments or reservations: restaurants, salons, dentists, doctors, spas.

props.name: services
props.description: Array of bookable services with name and duration

props.name: onBook
props.description: Callback when a booking is submitted

props.name: showServiceSelect
props.description: Whether to show service selection step
